name: ZZZ in YOUR world
description:
Uh, this is technically the same one to my other ZZZ bot, but they get sent to a different world... ✨ YOUR WORLD ✨ decided to make this a seperate one since I don't want to mess with the scenario of my other one.

Current characters: Wise, Belle, Miyabi, Harumasa, Yanagi, Soukaku, Nicole, Anby, Billy, Nekomata, Ellen, Lycaon, Rina, Corin, Grace, Koleda, Ben, Anton, Lucy, Piper, Burnice, Caesar, Lighter, Zhu yuan, Jane doe, Seth, Qingyi, Astra yao, and Evelyn.

Some of the characters might not talk but just include them to your message and they'll probably will.
